idea.title: Shipwreck Scrub
idea.hook: Scrape three layers of sea-grime off sunken ships, pocket the treasure underneath, and buy meaner tools for deeper wrecks.
idea.prototype: Portrait underwater wreck-cleaning game. Grime comes in LAYERS — algae (loose, wipes fast with Spray) over barnacle crust (needs Scraper) over rust stains (needs Polisher). Swipe to scrub with the equipped tool; only the right tool removes its layer. Cleaning uncovers coins + artifacts; sell between wrecks in a persistent SHOP to buy/upgrade tools (wider nozzle, power chisel for coral, ion spray for ectoplasm, bigger O2 tank, auto-polish) and unlock 6 escalating wrecks with new layer types (coral, ink, ghost-ship ectoplasm). Job-complete at >=95% clean. Non-timer pressure: an oxygen tank that drains per SCRUB STROKE (not per second) — sloppy/wrong-tool strokes waste O2; 3 wrong-tool strokes on a buried artifact crack it and fail the dive. A failed dive keeps all upgrades + banked coins and drops you back on the same wreck.
idea.mutation_of: Ice Sweeper + Power Wash (our own cleaning winners) + layered-excavation twist
idea.why_novel: multi-layer multi-tool cleaning with a persistent shop economy between dives — the depth/meta our cleaning winners lack and that player comments explicitly asked for (ice_sweeper: 'implement 2-3 layered breakable layers, add sounds maybe some meta upgrades'). NOT a restoration mini-game (relic_restore flopped); the verb stays satisfying mass-removal cleaning.
idea.non_timer_pressure: O2-per-stroke budget (drains on action, not time) + artifact damage limit (3 wrong-tool cracks = dive failed)

sources.title: Ice Sweeper (45.3s/play, 5:0 likes) + cleaning genre 95% like ratio
sources.snippet: Pretty fun game, implement 2-3 layered breakable layers, add sounds maybe some meta upgrades

sources.title: satisfying_spill feedback
sources.snippet: good mechanic! Lose conditions are unclear, need more levels, meta, develop further this might get attention

synthesizer_brief: KNOWLEDGE pick 2026-06-11: fresh mechanic extending the portfolio's most-validated family (cleaning/satisfying, 95% like). Layered multi-tool cleaning + treasure economy answering the depth/meta comment asks.

alternatives.title: Merge-family extension
alternatives.hook: fresh merge twist on beast_bazaar/merge_diner wins
alternatives.why_novel: rejected: merge family already 4 games deep internally
